title: Masters 2026: Rory McIlroy can't stop riding Augusta rollercoaster
description: Rory McIlroy says he will have to play better on Sunday if he is to defend his Masters title after letting slip a six-shot lead at Augusta National.
content:
The drama which Rory McIlroy has produced at the Masters over the years - the type that left his fans peeking through their fingers - is woven into the fabric of his story.
When McIlroy moved into a record six-shot lead at the halfway point, it felt ... [3834 chars]

title: Cameron Young reels in Rory McIlroy with pack on their tails for Masters finale
description: McIlroy’s six-shot lead evaporated to Young’s 65, and Shane Lowry, Justin Rose and Scottie Scheffler are among nine within five shots of the leading pair
content: Rory McIlroy began this Masters in the company of Cameron Young and will finish it in the company of Cameron Young. McIlroy arrived at this tournament as the holder of the Green Jacket. By Sunday night he will …? Goodness only knows. Day three proved... [4987 chars]

title: Tyson Fury returns with unanimous points win over Makhmudov and wants Joshua next
description: Tyson Fury completed the first stage of his latest comeback when he outclassed Arslanbek Makhmudov in a near-shutout over 12 rounds
content: Tyson Fury completed the first stage of his latest comeback when he outclassed Arslanbek Makhmudov in an uninspiring near shutout over 12 rounds late on Saturday night. The former world heavyweight champion has retired on five previous occasions and,... [5295 chars]

title: Hungarians decide whether to end 16 years of Orbán rule and elect rival
description: Most polls favour Péter Magyar, who fronts a grassroots party, but PM Viktor Orbán has been in a defiant mood.
content:
Hungarians go to the polls on Sunday in a vote that could bring down long-serving Prime Minister Viktor Orbán and have significant repercussions for the rest of Europe, the US and Russia.
Most polls favour Péter Magyar, who formed a grassroots party ... [6454 chars]
